python_runtime_binding.default_runtime_command: python -c "import sys; from agentic_workspace.cli import main; raise SystemExit(main(sys.argv[1:]))"

runtime_module_handlers.missing_module_message: The memory module must be installed to use memory subcommands.
The planning module must be installed to use planning subcommands.
